---
title: "2 · Evaluation data"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** The datasets used to *score* the twin, kept separate from processing and compared at
native sensor resolution. Independent references (in-situ, satellite) versus model evaluation
datasets — and why a product that shares our forcing is a consistency check, not validation.
:::

*Content migrating from the report's "Evaluation datasets" section and the evaluation-dataset
(model / reanalysis) classification.*

## Independent references (in-situ, satellite)

## Model / reanalysis evaluation datasets

## Consistency check vs independent validation
